name: EVIDE
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external post-event evidence and reconstructability crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: EVIDE can preserve or organize evidence after an event or decision.
EVIDE can support reconstruction and dispute review.
non_claims: EVIDE does not prove transition admissibility.
EVIDE does not grant execution authority.
Post-event evidence does not prove commit-time standing.

transition_table_mapping.claims: evidence preservation, event reconstruction, dispute support
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, runtime enforcement, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external evidence registry posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.receipt_or_trace_model: evidence deposit reference and wiki record
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct evidence posture and limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: evidence may inform standing review but cannot replace it
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing evidence, undefined mapping, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
